name: 41_Stock_Classification_KNN_YahooFinance_ML
query: Tengeneza mfumo wa uainishaji wa hisa kwa kutumia mfano wa KNN kwenye seti ya data ya Yahoo Finance. Utekelezaji wako unapaswa kuamua ikiwa hisa fulani itaongezeka au kupungua bei. Anza kwa kupakia seti ya data na kufanya uhandisi wa vipengele, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuzalisha viashiria vya kiufundi na kuchagua vipengele muhimu zaidi katika `src/data_loader.py`. Sanifisha data ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tumia kisanidi cha KNN kuainisha hisa kulingana na vipengele vilivyoundwa, na uhifadhi utekelezaji katika `src/model.py`. Kisha, hifadhi matokeo ya uainishaji katika `results/classification_results.txt`, na onyesha uhusiano kati ya viashiria vya kiufundi na matokeo ya uainishaji kama ramani ya joto kwa kutumia seaborn. Hifadhi ramani ya joto kama `results/figures/feature_correlation_heatmap.png`. Hatimaye, tengeneza Jupyter Notebook inayoweza kuingiliana chini ya `results/` ambayo inaelezea mchakato, inaonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji, na itasaidia kurahisisha masasisho ya baadaye yanayoanzisha data mpya.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Yahoo Finance" inatumika, ikiwa ni pamoja na upakiaji na maandalizi ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uhandisi wa vipengele unafanywa, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuzalisha viashiria vya kiufundi na kufanya uteuzi wa vipengele katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Data inasanifishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
"Kisanidi cha KNN" kinatumika kuainisha hisa kulingana na vipengele vilivyoundwa. Tafadhali hifadhi utekelezaji katika `src/model.py`.
Ramani ya joto inayoonyesha uhusiano kati ya viashiria vya kiufundi na matokeo ya uainishaji inahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/feature_correlation_heatmap.png`.
Jupyter Notebook inayoweza kuingiliana inatengenezwa chini ya `results/` ili kuelezea mchakato na kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji.

preferences.criteria: Jupyter Notebook inapaswa kujumuisha maelezo wazi ya kila hatua, ikiwa ni pamoja na uhandisi wa vipengele na tathmini ya mfano.
Ramani ya joto ya uhusiano inapaswa kuonyesha viashiria vya kiufundi muhimu zaidi na kutoa ufahamu juu ya uhusiano wao.
Mfumo unapaswa kuruhusu masasisho rahisi na data mpya, na kufanya notebook iwe rahisi kwa uchambuzi wa baadaye.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Yahoo Finance" inatumika, ikiwa ni pamoja na upakiaji na maandalizi ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not actually implement Yahoo Finance data loading. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation with a `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` and a `build_transforms()` function returning a static list. There is no actual use of Yahoo Finance API (e.g., `yfinance` library), no real data downloading, no actual data preparation or preprocessing code. The file merely lists requirement criteria as strings and simulates compliance without fulfilling it.

judge_stats.criteria: Uhandisi wa vipengele unafanywa, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuzalisha viashiria vya kiufundi na kufanya uteuzi wa vipengele katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The `src/data_loader.py` file does not implement any actual feature engineering. It is a minimal placeholder/stub that only defines a list of requirement criteria strings and two dummy functions (`load_dataset()` and `build_transforms()`) that return hardcoded placeholder values. There is no actual code for:

- Generating technical indicators (e.g., moving averages, RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, etc.)
- Performing feature selection (e.g., correlation analysis, variance thresholding, SelectKBest, etc.)
- Loading or processing any real Yahoo Finance data

The file explicitly states it is a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" — confirming it is not a real implementation. The trajectory evidence also confirms no feature engineering was executed.

judge_stats.criteria: Data inasanifishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not contain any actual data standardization/normalization implementation. The file is merely a placeholder ("Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging") that lists requirement criteria as strings but does not implement any real functionality. There is no use of standardization tools such as `StandardScaler`, `MinMaxScaler`, or any equivalent normalization logic. The `load_dataset()` function simply returns a dictionary with placeholder text, and `build_transforms()` returns a hardcoded list of strings without any actual transformation code. No real data standardization is performed.

judge_stats.criteria: "Kisanidi cha KNN" kinatumika kuainisha hisa kulingana na vipengele vilivyoundwa. Tafadhali hifadhi utekelezaji katika `src/model.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not contain an actual KNN classifier implementation. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub with metadata strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS`) and a `build_model()` function that returns a string placeholder ("model placeholder"). There is no actual KNN algorithm, no use of scikit-learn's `KNeighborsClassifier` or any equivalent, no feature fitting, no training, and no stock classification logic. The trajectory evidence also confirms that no real KNN implementation was recorded or executed.

<UNSATISFIED>: Faili `results/classification_results.txt` ipo, lakini maudhui yake ni `('placeholder\r\n', None)` — ambayo ni thamani ya "placeholder" tu, si matokeo halisi ya uainishaji (kama vile accuracy, precision, recall, confusion matrix, au matokeo ya KNN). Hii inaonyesha kwamba msimbo haukutekelezwa ipasavyo na matokeo ya kweli ya uainishaji hayakuhifadhiwa katika faili hiyo.

judge_stats.criteria: Ramani ya joto inayoonyesha uhusiano kati ya viashiria vya kiufundi na matokeo ya uainishaji inahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/feature_correlation_heatmap.png`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>

Faili `results/figures/feature_correlation_heatmap.png` ipo katika muundo wa mradi kama inavyoonekana katika Project Tree. Ingawa kuna hitilafu ya kusoma picha (tatizo la aina ya media - JPEG vs PNG), hii ni tatizo la mfumo wa tathmini wa picha, si ukosefu wa faili yenyewe. Faili ipo katika njia sahihi `results\figures\feature_correlation_heatmap.png` kama inavyohitajika.

judge_stats.criteria: Jupyter Notebook inayoweza kuingiliana inatengenezwa chini ya `results/` ili kuelezea mchakato na kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The project structure shows only `results/classification_results.txt` and `results/figures/feature_correlation_heatmap.png` under the `results/` directory. There is no Jupyter Notebook (`.ipynb` file) present. The trajectory evidence also confirms that no Jupyter Notebook was created, executed, or saved under `results/`. The implemented files (`data_loader.py` and `model.py`) are minimal placeholder stubs that do not contain actual implementation logic, and neither file generates or references a notebook.
